title: Lovely Garlicky Spanish Cannellini Beans Paella Valenciana
description: A garlicky and flavorful Spanish dish featuring cannellini beans, this paella valenciana is a crowd-pleaser and can be made in a lotus leaf wrap for a unique presentation.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the cannellini beans, saffron threads, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for 5 minutes until the beans are tender.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice and scrape up any browned bits from the bottom.
Divide the bean mixture among the lotus leaf wraps.
Fold the lotus leaf wraps to enclose the filling and serve immediately.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve hot.
